text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, hey! Yuki, you like cake, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Then let's go check out that new cake shop by the
station!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Huh? The super spiffy one?! You sure you wanna
go with me?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That shop's super-duper eeextra cute, right? Then
you'll fit right in!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Awww! Y-you sure know how t'sweet-talk a girl!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, why not! I can't turn down such a swell
inv'tation! Look out, cakes, here I come!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right, then it's settled! Those sweet treats will
soon be ours! ♪
